name: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc.
description: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. is a leading global designer and manufacturer of injectable pharmaceutical packaging and delivery systems. Founded in 1923 and headquartered in Exton, Pennsylvania, the company specializes in providing high-quality containment and delivery solutions for injectable drugs, biologics, vaccines, and consumer healthcare products. By leveraging advanced materials science and precision engineering, West supports the pharmaceutical and biotechnology industries in ensuring the safety, integrity, and effective administration of life-saving medications to patients worldwide, maintaining a significant presence across the Americas, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region.
